executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Focus on the issue detail view at http://localhost:8080/project-hub/BAU/allwork?issue=BAU-5740. Test: 1) Navigation to issue via deep-link URL, 2) Status pill click opens dropdown, 3) Status dropdown shows non-bold lozenges grouped by TO DO/IN PROGRESS/DONE, 4) Status change persists, 5) Subtasks section expand/collapse, 6) Subtasks header has NO grid/column-picker icon (only ··· and +), 7) Create sub-task inline, 8) Improve Story button opens dropdown (no chevron on trigger), 9) Improve Story menu items: describe/summarize/suggest/link, 10) Linked work items section expand/collapse, 11) Add linked work item, 12) Attachments section expand, 13) Key details section expand/collapse, 14) Description editor click-to-edit, 15) Configure button opens drawer, 16) Configure pin a field, 17) Priority field visible in Key details, 18) Parent field shows in Key details, 19) Breadcrumb BAU/parent/issue-key navigation, 20) Up/down arrow navigation between issues, 21) Share button visible, 22) View workflow from status picker footer, 23) Assignee field in Details sidebar, 24) Reporter field in Details sidebar, 25) Labels field in Details sidebar, 26) Fix versions field in Details sidebar, 27) Created/Updated timestamps visible in Details
